Allegria

Authentic Italian Pizza in Adamstown

Allegria is Italian for happiness and we believe that a great pizza brings happiness. Our fresh ingredients, prepared by our pizzaioli and cooked in a traditionnal wood fire oven, will give you the authentic taste of pizza. So come visit us to have a slice of Allegria

Call us now to order:

081 234 5678

Opening times

Day Open Close
Mon Closed
Tue - Thur 4pm 10pm
Fri - Sat 4pm 12am
Sun 12pm 10pm
